author: y4rr
content: Commit 8538abd90 lands the aligned=false fix. Per task directive 'NO declaring closure until 8/8 PASS verified by REAL harness output' the issue stays OPEN — keypointrcnn image 397133 has score_max_abs=0.0245 vs the 0.02 tolerance threshold (0.0045 over). All other 7 models PASS unchanged; keypointrcnn 4/5 images PASS. The residual is f32 rank-4 sorted-score drift on a borderline 2-class person detection, not a structural bug — locking-in a NEW followup-only-allowed-after-this-resolves issue may be the right path, OR the harness convention for 2-class detection models may need to use box-IoU-paired scores instead of top-K sorted scores (different metric, not tolerance loosening).
